repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: School of Hotel Administration. Center for Hospitality Research records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Center for Hospitality Research

did.abstract: Includes reports, publications, and white papers pertaining to the hospitality industry.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: School of Hotel Administration Center for Hospitality Research Records, #28-14-4072. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes reports, publications, and white papers pertaining to the hospitality industry (2003-2012) and Cornell Hospitality Quarterly publication contracts,1995 subscribers study, Elsevier and Sage Publications correspondence and contracts, copyright transfer agreements, copyright clearance (2000-2005), marketing research reports, plans, and proposals.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: The Center for Hospitality Research (CHR) is the source for research on and for the hospitality industry. Center Fellows work with business leaders to develop new ideas, theories, and models that improve strategic, managerial, and operating practices. These insights are captured in research reports and industry tools that are available online.

controlaccess.subject: Hospitality industry -- Periodicals
Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
Hotel management -- Study and teaching.

Center for Hospitality Research Annual Reports
